_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: With zero ±2+ point moves in 37 windows and no confirmed breaker visible, HOLD is the statistically honest call — the coil resolves when funding turns sustainably positive or VIX spikes force a leg down.
next_move.brains_agree: Split — analyst explicitly calls HOLD with medium conviction citing 0-for-18 coil record; narrative writer implies accumulation/relief rally setup but does not issue a directional signal, creating an ambiguity the judge resolves toward the analyst's higher trust weight and data-backed caution.
next_move.confirmed_if: BTC funding turns sustainably positive (>0.01%) with Fear/Greed breaking above 38 and stablecoin growth accelerating above 55
next_move.invalidated_if: VIX spikes above 22 with BTC breaking below $62K and MVRV z-score dropping below 15, forcing a move to Panic leg down
